en_title: CONFIRMED: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis Is Delayed to 2027, First Look at Gameplay
cn_title: 《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》延期至2027年，实机画面首曝
subtitle: 经典重启，再等一年
opus_summary: 《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》确认延期至2027年2月12日发售，登陆任天堂Switch 2等平台。State of Play上首次展示实机画面。游戏售价59.99美元(约合人民币430元)，将与微软《神鬼寓言》同期竞争。本作是1996年初代《古墓丽影》的重制版，由Crystal Dynamics开发，亚马逊发行。延期原因未明，但可能与《GTA6》年底发售有关。Crystal Dynamics近一年内已进行四轮裁员，但仍表示全力投入《古墓丽影》系列。

paragraphs.en: UPDATE: As expected, Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis is delayed until next year, with a gameplay showing at State of Play confirming a February 12, 2027 release date.
paragraphs.cn: 更新：不出所料，《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》延期至明年，State of Play上展示的实机画面确认了2027年2月12日的发售日期。

paragraphs.en: Today’s announcement also confirmed that Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis will be available on Nintendo Switch 2 on launch day, February 12, 2027. "Players can expect the same cinematic scale and fluid gameplay, fully optimized for the Nintendo Switch 2 hardware — at home, on the go, or wherever adventure calls," Amazon Game Studios and Crystal Dynamics said.
paragraphs.cn: 今天的公告还确认，《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》将于2027年2月12日发售当天同步登陆任天堂Switch 2。亚马逊游戏工作室和Crystal Dynamics表示：「玩家可以期待同样的电影级规模和流畅玩法，针对任天堂Switch 2硬件全面优化——无论在家、在路上，还是任何冒险召唤之处。」

paragraphs.en: ORIGINAL STORY: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis looks set for a release date delay announcement, after what appears to be an online advert leak ahead of Sony’s State of Play showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 原始报道：在索尼State of Play展示会之前，一则疑似在线广告泄露，表明《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》即将宣布延期。

paragraphs.en: Wario64, who as an Amazon Associate tweets affiliate links, took to X / Twitter to link to two listings for Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis on Amazon alongside images, apparently confirming a $59.99 price point and a February 10, 2027 release date. Neither link is currently live.
paragraphs.cn: Wario64（作为亚马逊联盟成员发布推广链接）在X/Twitter上贴出了《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》在亚马逊上的两个商品页面及图片，似乎确认了59.99美元(约合人民币430元)的售价和2027年2月10日的发售日期。目前这两个链接均已失效。

paragraphs.en: We have no official explanation for the delay, but it's worth noting GTA 6's upcoming November launch, which will no doubt command attention and threaten the success of any triple-A video game that dares to come out in and around it. Tomb Raider will, however, now go up against Microsoft's Fable, which was similarly recently delayed to February 2027 .
paragraphs.cn: 官方尚未说明延期原因，但值得注意的是，《GTA6》即将于11月发售，这无疑会吸引大量关注，并威胁任何敢于在其前后发售的3A游戏的成功。不过，《古墓丽影》现在将与微软的《神鬼寓言》同期竞争，后者同样于近期延期至2027年2月。

paragraphs.en: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis is a remake of the original 1996 Tomb Raider, and was set for release later this year. Developer Crystal Dynamics is also working on a brand new Tomb Raider game, Tomb Raider: Catalyst, which was due out at some point in 2027. Alix Wilton Regan plays Lara Croft in both games, replacing Camilla Luddington, who portrayed Lara Croft in the Survivor Trilogy.
paragraphs.cn: 《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》是1996年初代《古墓丽影》的重制版，原定于今年晚些时候发售。开发商Crystal Dynamics还在开发一款全新的《古墓丽影》游戏《古墓丽影：催化剂》，原计划2027年某个时候推出。Alix Wilton Regan在两款游戏中饰演劳拉·克劳馥，取代了在幸存者三部曲中饰演劳拉的Camilla Luddington。

paragraphs.en: In March, Crystal Dynamics suffered its fourth redundancy round in 12 months , although the Embracer-owned studio insisted it remained “fully committed to the future development" of the Lara Croft franchise. The upcoming Tomb Raider games are published by Amazon, which is also working on a Tomb Raider TV show for Prime Video starring Game of Thrones’ Sophie Turner.
paragraphs.cn: 今年3月，Crystal Dynamics在12个月内遭遇了第四轮裁员，尽管这家Embracer旗下的工作室坚称仍「全力致力于」劳拉·克劳馥系列的未来开发。即将推出的《古墓丽影》游戏由亚马逊发行，亚马逊还在为Prime Video制作一部《古墓丽影》电视剧，由《权力的游戏》女星Sophie Turner主演。

paragraphs.en: Not long now until State of Play. Join us for our live blog , where we'll report on all the announcements and trailers.
paragraphs.cn: State of Play即将开始。欢迎关注我们的实时博客，我们将报道所有公告和预告片。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。在Twitter上关注他：@wyp100。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。

translated_terms.Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis: 古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹
